title: ProductOfferingRelationship
description: ProductOfferingRelationship schema from TM Forum API

allOf.description: A relationship between two product Offerings.

role.description: The association role for the source product offering

name.description: Name of the referred product offering type.

relationshipType.description: Type of relationship between product offerings such as requires, exchangableTo, optionalFor

version.description: Version of the referred product offering.
